facebook.content_angle: Three mistakes East Auckland sellers make in autumn that cost them money
facebook.post_text:
Most sellers don't realise these mistakes are costing them thousands. 🍂

You've decided to sell this autumn — exciting! But a few common missteps can quietly eat into your final result before negotiations even begin.

👉 Skipping small repairs before listing — buyers notice everything, and it shifts their offer mindset
👉 Pricing based on emotion, not current East Auckland market data — hope is not a strategy
👉 Underestimating presentation — how your home feels on first impression sets the ceiling on price

The good news? Every one of these is completely avoidable. 💡

✔️ A pre-market walkthrough can catch what you've stopped seeing
✔️ Local comparable sales data gives you real pricing confidence
✔️ Simple styling and decluttering can add serious perceived value

Autumn buyers are motivated and ready — the homes that are prepared are the ones that win.

Are you thinking about selling this autumn and wondering where to start?
facebook.engagement_bait: Drop a 🍂 if you're considering a move this season — I'd love to help you plan it right.
facebook.call_to_action: Are you thinking about selling this autumn and wondering where to start?
